hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines originator and beneficiary data management by connecting Travel Rule messages, routing status, exceptions, and audit evidence into one operational compliance layer for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule data gaps hinder VASP compliance
problem_description: Incomplete or inconsistent originator and beneficiary information slows Travel Rule workflows for VASPs. This creates challenges in routing, exception handling, and maintaining a clear audit trail for regulatory and internal review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies originator and beneficiary details with message routing status, exceptions, wallet activity, and case workflows into one auditable Travel Rule compliance layer for VASP teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages and originator beneficiary data through exception handling, review, case creation and evidence preservation for compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule tool. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects originator and beneficiary data with Travel Rule messages, exceptions, cases and evidence to give VASPs clearer operational control and audit-ready workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled originator and beneficiary data workflows, preserving audit evidence and enabling bank due diligence within enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule messages link originator and beneficiary
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports Travel Rule exception handling

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing status, exceptions, originator and beneficiary data into a connected compliance workflow for VASPs, enhancing operational control and traceability.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage originator and beneficiary data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures originator and beneficiary data from multiple providers, supporting completeness, accuracy and consistency within Travel Rule cases and alerts for efficient review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence related to Travel Rule events, enabling audit-ready review and transparent compliance documentation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing Travel Rule providers to consolidate message routing, status tracking and exception handling into a single operational system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing them.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule data into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes originator, beneficiary, routing, exceptions and cases into audit-ready compliance records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
